hero_badge: v5.6.0 + TUI v9.13.0 · Open source · 21 MCP tools
hero_subtitle:
为人类和 AI 代理打造的认知外骨骼。
思考。模拟。证明。发现。
hero_tags: Z₃³ · 27 STATES · 6 OPERATORS · 51 SOURCES · 38 ENGINES · 21 MCP · O₀→O₁→O₂ · 23 MPs
fp_title: 代理会说话。但它们会思考吗？
fp_desc: AI 代理拥有语言。缺乏认知。c4reqber 是代理心智的科学躯体。
features_title: 唯一的 AI 认知外骨骼
features_desc: 不是功能。认知器官。每个模块都是真实实现。
feat_c4_desc: 27 个离散认知状态，跨越时间、规模和主体维度。每个查询都可映射、跟踪和导航。
feat_verify_desc: Lean4, Coq, Dafny, Agda, Z3/Hoare, Haskell, CVC5, TLA+, Alloy (9 real bridges).
feat_sim_desc: Molecular dynamics (GROMACS, OpenMM), quantum (PySCF), CFD (OpenFOAM), neuro (NEURON), and more.
feat_kg_desc: arXiv, PubMed, Semantic Scholar, OpenAlex, Europe PMC, Crossref, Zenodo, ClinicalTrials.gov, GBIF, NASA Earthdata, Materials Project, Kaggle, OpenFDA, ORCID, and 30 more. MultiSourceSearcher with circuit breaker and semantic dedup.
feat_pub_desc: LaTeX + BibTeX + Markdown + JSON + HTML 导出。引用验证器带幻觉检测。可直接用于 arXiv、bioRxiv 或同行评审。
feat_mcp_desc: Expose full C4REQBER capability to AI agents. JSON Schema compliant. stdio JSON-RPC.
c4_desc: 离散群论认知空间。不是神经网络。不是符号规则。数学拓扑。
comp_desc: 不是 LLM 包装器。认知操作系统。
pt_title: 流水线阶段 — 每阶段一个模型
pt_desc: 7 个阶段。每个阶段都有自己的 LLM 模型、插件和认知策略。
pt_swap: 每个阶段的模型均可完全配置——在配置文件中自由更换。
qs_academic_hint: 学术提示：使用 --verify 标志自动调用 Lean4/Coq 进行定理检查。
roadmap_desc: 持续交付模拟引擎、AI 集成和验证后端。
roadmap_v55_body:
✓ 零类型安全（56 mypy baseline 错误）
✓ MCP 21 工具 + JSON Schema
✓ Virtual Bio + GPU 自动检测
✓ 36 个集成模拟引擎
✓ TUI v9 Cockpit + blast tui 命令
roadmap_v56_body:
✓ 死代码清理（删除 6 个模块 + 孤立测试）
✓ 14 个 API 密钥接入 MultiSourceSearcher
✓ Pydantic V2 迁移（ConfigDict、field_validator）
✓ 引用验证器带幻觉检测
✓ TUI v8 立方吉祥物重写 + Go 审计（staticcheck 0）
✓ 集成观察者位置移位 O₀→O₁→O₂
✓ Pipeline 步骤 s4 中的 23 个核心元程序
✓ 每次 solve() 调用重置成本追踪器
roadmap_v57_body:
○ JuliaDiff auto-differentiation
○ LangGraph state-machine agents
○ Unsloth local LLM fine-tuning
○ vLLM high-throughput inference
○ ChromaDB / LanceDB RAG layer
○ CrewAI multi-agent orchestration
engines_desc: 5 internal GPU engines + 33 open-source bridges. From molecular dynamics to climate modeling.
engines_note: P1 = Python-native open-source bridge · 5 Built-in GPU engines · Full list in src/simulations/
sysreq_desc: macOS 和 Linux 已测试并受支持。Windows 未测试。外部引擎需要单独安装。
os_windows_status: ✗ 未测试 · WSL2 可能可用
pip_scope_note: 注意： pip install c4reqber 仅安装 Python 包 + CLI。外部模拟引擎（GROMACS、OpenFOAM 等）需要单独安装。参见 docs/setup/gpu.html。
price_desc: 每次完整流水线运行从 $0.002 到 $0.11。按阶段配置。
usecases_desc: 从硬科学到社会科学 — c4reqber 适应您的领域。
uc_hard_desc: Physics, chemistry, biology, materials. TRIZ + 38 simulation engine bridges + formal verification.
uc_psych_desc: 认知行为疗法元分析、组织行为、政治心理学。因果推断 + 智能体模型。
uc_clinical_desc: 随机对照试验设计、生物标志物、药物相互作用。PubMed + ClinicalTrials.gov + STRING。
uc_eco_desc: 生物多样性、气候建模、海洋动力学。GBIF + NASA Earthdata + WRF。
uc_law_desc: 法律推理、判例分析、监管影响。多司法管辖区 + 时序推理。
cta_sub: 一个命令。一篇论文。一次范式转变。
cta_license: AGPL-3.0 · BYOK · 无数据保留 · 可自托管
hero_meta: AGPL-3.0 · BYOK · Multi-Prompt Router · Terminal-First · OpenRouter · XAI · Mistral · Moonshot · DeepSeek · Liquid · NVIDIA · YandexGPT · Ollama · LM Studio · MLX
fp_no_sim_desc: 大语言模型生成假设但无法测试。没有物理引擎，没有统计验证，没有真实基准。
fp_no_verify_desc: ChatGPT 通过生成有说服力的文本来"证明"定理。形式验证需要 Lean4、Coq、Dafny。
fp_no_cog_desc: 智能体无法识别自身的观察偏见或推理中的漏洞。c4reqber 使用 O₀→O₁ 观察者移位自动发现盲点。
fp_no_rigor_desc: 可证伪性、真实引用、可重复性——科学的基础。在大多数代理框架中缺失。
fp_conclusion: c4reqber solves all four. Formal verification + 38 simulation engine bridges + Z₃³ cognitive topology + real citations + O₀→O₁→O₂ meta-cognitive observer.
trust_desc: 类型安全。经实战检验。透明。
trust_feat_sanitize_desc: 每个 LLM 输入都经过净化。Nonce 分隔符、LaTeX 转义、HTML 实体解码。故障关闭。
trust_feat_sandbox_desc: 模拟引擎在隔离环境中运行。无 shell 注入。阻止路径遍历。符号链接防护。
trust_feat_proofs_desc: Lean4、Coq、Dafny、Agda、Z3 — 每个形式证明都经过机器检查。不含糊。
trust_feat_audit_desc: 多代理自动审计、静态分析（mypy、Bandit）和社区安全审查。
sources_title: 51 个知识来源 — 真实引用
sources_desc: 没有幻觉引用。每个引用都通过 DOI 在实时数据库中验证。
theory_why_p1: 现代人工智能生成文本。它不会思考。c4reqber 建立在一种认知数学理论之上，该理论将思维视为在离散状态空间中的导航——就像 GPS 在坐标中导航一样。
theory_why_p2: 每个研究问题都会获得一个认知坐标 F⟨时间, 规模, 主体性⟩。然后系统计算到目标状态的最短路径，选择转换算子，并根据形式定理验证每一步。这不是比喻——定理在约 3,600 行 Agda 中得到验证：gitlab.com/cognitive-functors/Adaptive-topology/-/tree/main/formal-proofs。
theory_ucos_desc: UCOS 将每个组件集成到一个单一的分析框架中。它映射查询如何从流程流向拓扑并返回。
theory_ucos_flow: 查询进入第 1 层（进程），由第 2 层（23 个核心元程序）进行概要分析，在第 4 层（C4 坐标）中定位，并由第 3 层（QZRF 算子）进行转换，直到达到目标状态。
theory_c4_desc: 认知在离散的三维空间中运作：时间 × 规模 × 主体性，每个维度有 3 个值。总计：27 个状态。这是通用智能的最小完整结构——通过群论和范畴论验证。
theory_qzrf_desc: QZRF（量子 Z 区 递归 波动）是拓扑结构（C4）和静态内容（元程序）之间的「脉搏」。其14 个算子将72 个 Matrix Dream 微模式聚合为 5 个基于相位的转换组。每个算子针对特定的 C4 状态。
theory_cdi_title: CDI — 创造性及破坏性洞见
theory_cdi_desc: 突破并非来自渐进式步骤。它们需要对遥远认知状态的可控遍历——暂时占据打破当前假设的不兼容位置。CDI 是一个利用定理 11（直径 ≤ 6）保证有界搜索的 6 步算法。
theory_cdi_einstein: 爱因斯坦的洞见代表了最大距离的概念飞跃——这正是 C4 对革命性突破的预测。搜索复杂度为 O(1)，因为状态空间是有界的。
theory_observer_title: 观察者位置 — O₀ / O₁ / O₂
theory_observer_desc: 认知不仅关乎状态——还关乎谁观察它们。观察者位置增加了用模态逻辑 ◯ₙ 建模的元认知维度。每个级别看到 27 状态空间的不同子集。
theory_observer_use: c4reqber 在管道执行期间使用观察者转移：O₀ 用于正常处理，O₁ 用于自我诊断覆盖（~10–20% 开销），O₂ 用于卡住时的全局架构重组。
theory_meta_title: C4-META — 观察者作为不变量
theory_meta_desc: C4-META 用 6 个关于观察者作为认知宇宙之间不变同构的定理扩展了 C4。该框架在 6 个模块的约 3,600 行 Agda（安全模式，无 K）中形式化。
theory_phi_desc: C4-META 的理论构造：现在、抽象和他人对齐的收敛点。27 状态空间的几何在 Φ 周围创建了一个自然盆地，18 个状态在可达范围内，9 个遥远。在 compassion-convergence.agda 证明模块中探讨。
theory_proofs_desc: 核心定理在多个证明辅助工具中得到验证。T1–T11（C4 属性）和 T12–T17（范畴必然性、观察者定理）经过机器检查。
theory_why3_desc: 三个梯度是极性对立（过去/未来、具体/元、自我/系统）之间非线性插值的最小值。二元太粗糙；四元浪费状态。27 状态空间已针对 18 条历史科学家发现路径进行验证。
theory_mp_title: 23 元程序 → 3 个代理配置
theory_mp_desc: MPRotationStep 使用不同的 MP 组合创建 3 个代理配置。每个配置生成关键见解和盲点。SynthesisStep 整合它们，通过感知滤镜旋转消除认知盲点。
splash_tagline: Cognitive exoskeleton for humans and AI agents
disc_sub: Six full blast turbo runs — literature search, gap mining, simulation, and gated dissertation prose. Real pipeline artifacts, not marketing copy.
disc_epistemic: Epistemic status: These are research proposals (untested hypotheses + computational pre-screening). They are not peer-reviewed dissertations. Every file includes an explicit disclaimer. Validate citations and claims before any use.
disc_card_climate_desc: Geoengineering research proposal: MCB parameter space, field experiments, polar efficacy hypotheses.
disc_card_fusion_desc: Distributed clean energy pathway: breakthrough physics hypotheses for grid decarbonization by 2040.
disc_card_aging_desc: Metabolic reprogramming hypotheses with gap-mined falsifiers and simulation-backed framing.
disc_card_amr_desc: Engineered phage + CRISPR hypotheses to restore antibiotic efficacy against resistant pathogens.
disc_card_soil_desc: Regenerative agriculture hypotheses for desertification reversal and durable soil carbon pools.
disc_card_plastic_desc: Topic-routed biogeochemistry sim; microbial/enzyme remediation hypotheses v2.

show_step2_desc: One command triggers the full HIL pipeline: search, gaps, simulation, verification, dissertation.
show_step3_desc: Quality gates block slop. Only prose that passes word-count and placeholder checks is saved.

show_verified_disclaimer: Hypotheses only — not peer-reviewed. Each file carries an epistemic disclaimer.

cl_sub: In plain language — no jargon required.
cl_what_desc: A terminal-first research assistant. You ask a scientific question — c4reqber searches 51 literature sources, runs simulations, checks proofs, and writes a gated research proposal. Not a chatbot. A pipeline.
cl_install_desc: One command. Python 3.11+. Bring your own API key (OpenRouter, Mistral, etc.). Optional GPU for heavy sims.
cl_use_desc: blast solve "your question" for a one-shot run. blast turbo for paradigm proposals. blast tui for the visual cockpit. blast serve --mcp for AI agents.
df_desc: 7 stages. Each transforms, validates, and enriches. No black boxes.
df_s1_desc: Strip HTML, normalize unicode, block injection
gal_desc: Production-ready outputs generated by the actual pipeline.

doc_faq_a2: Free and open-source (AGPL-3.0). You only pay for LLM API calls. A full pipeline run costs $0.002–$0.11 depending on tier.
doc_faq_a3: No. GPU is optional. Apple Silicon (MLX) and NVIDIA CUDA accelerate simulation; the core pipeline runs on CPU.
doc_faq_a4: macOS and Linux are fully tested. Windows may work under WSL2.

arch_ucos_l4_desc: C4 = ℤ₃³ — 27 states. Coordinate system for navigation, pathfinding, and Theorem 9/11 validation.
aud_1_html:
1. PhD Students and Early-Career Researchers (Year 1–3)

Problem: "I know I'm interested in X, but I don't understand what's already been done and where the gaps are."

What c4reqber provides:

  • Literature review in 2 minutes instead of 2 weeks — 51 sources: arXiv, PubMed, Semantic Scholar, OpenAlex, Europe PMC, Crossref, Zenodo, and more
  • Structured gaps with potential assessment
  • Formulation of 3–5 competing hypotheses with falsifiable predictions
  • List of control experiments (DoE design)

Honesty: This is a starting point, not a final review. Hypotheses require expert verification — LLMs can hallucinate mechanisms.
aud_2_html:
2. Interdisciplinary Researchers

Problem: "I'm a biologist, but my problem requires physics/math/computer science. I don't know which tools from neighboring disciplines are applicable."

What c4reqber provides:

  • TRIZ analysis: 40 inventive principles applied to your problem
  • Isomorphisms: "Here are 3 similar problems from chemistry, solved with methods you don't know as a biologist"
  • C4 navigation across 27 cognitive states — structures chaotic thinking
  • Transfer pipeline: automatic analogy search between domains

Honesty: Works best when disciplines are close (biochemistry → biophysics). Quality drops for distant bridges (quantum mechanics → sociology).
aud_3_html:
3. Engineers and R&D Managers

Problem: "We need to improve a product/process, but the team is stuck in a local optimum."

What c4reqber provides:

  • TRIZ contradictions: "Increase speed without increasing energy consumption"
  • Patent landscape analysis (USPTO, OpenReview, Google Patents)
  • Structured "paradoxes" with proposed solutions
  • Simulations: CFD (OpenFOAM, FEniCSx), molecular dynamics (GROMACS, LAMMPS), multi-physics (MuJoCo, PyBullet)
aud_4_html:
4. Psychologists and Social Scientists

Problem: "My field is hard to formalize. Can AI even help study human behavior, therapy, or social phenomena?"

What c4reqber provides:

  • Literature search across psychological databases: PubMed (psychiatry), ClinicalTrials.gov, OpenReview, Harvard Dataverse, Kaggle
  • Causal inference (DoWhy, EconML, gCastle): "Does X affect Y?" with confounder control — critical for A/B tests in therapy
  • Agent models (Mesa, SimPy): modeling group behavior, norm diffusion, herding effects
  • Contradiction mining: finding contradictory claims in literature
  • TRIZ for social systems: 40 principles applicable to organizational problems

Honesty: c4reqber does not diagnose patients and does not replace a therapist. In social sciences, quality depends on data quality — if your niche has few peer-reviewed articles, LLMs will hallucinate. But for literature review, hypothesis structuring, and causal modeling, it is a powerful tool.
aud_5_html:
5. Clinical Researchers / Medical Doctors

Problem: "Need to design an RCT, find biomarkers, understand drug mechanism of action."

What c4reqber provides:

  • PubMed + Europe PMC + ClinicalTrials.gov + STRING + ChEMBL + PubChem
  • Causal inference for observational data: "Which factor actually causes the side effect?"
  • Simulations: pharmacokinetics (COPASI, Tellurium), PBPK models
  • Network pharmacology: STRING + Cytoscape-compatible output
aud_6_html:
6. Ecologists, Climatologists, Geographers

Problem: "Complex multi-factor systems, long time series, uncertainty in models."

What c4reqber provides:

  • GBIF (biodiversity), NASA Earthdata (satellite), USGS (geology), CERN (physics)
  • Bayesian models (PyMC, Stan): uncertainty quantification
  • Agent models: ecosystem simulations (predator-prey, invasive species)
  • Simulations: WRF (weather), FEniCSx (fluid dynamics for ocean modeling)
aud_7_html:
7. Data Scientists and ML Researchers

Problem: "Feature engineering, model selection, interpretation, causal claims from correlation data."

What c4reqber provides:

  • Kaggle + UCI ML Repository + Harvard Dataverse: dataset search
  • Causal inference: "Is this feature actually causal or just correlated?"
  • AutoML: automatic model enumeration (autoresearch layer)
  • Bayesian models: uncertainty quantification, model comparison (BMA)
  • Simulations: synthetic data generation for edge cases
aud_8_html:
8. Formal Verifiers / Theorists

Problem: "I have an idea, but I want to check it for contradictions formally."

What c4reqber provides:

  • Auto-generation of formal specification from natural language (Lean4, Coq, Dafny, Z3, Hoare)
  • Iterative compilation error correction (LLM → compile → error → fix loop)
  • Export proofs to .lean, .v, .smt2
  • MathDetector: automatic categorization of mathematical statements

Honesty: Auto-generation from natural language is not yet fully implemented. Works best if you explicitly provide the theorem statement.
aud_compare_html:
Honest Comparison with Analogues

ToolWhat it doesWhere c4reqber is betterWhere c4reqber is worse
Elicit / ConsensusLiterature search + summarizationStructured hypothesis with predictions, not just summaryUX is simpler in Elicit
SciSpaceReading papers with AI assistantCross-paper synthesis + contradiction detection + 51 sourcesNo inline PDF reader
ChatGPT / ClaudeGeneric Q&ADomain-aware simulation (38 engine bridges), formal verification, TRIZ, causal inference, structured pipelineGeneric Q&A is sometimes more accurate for simple questions
MATLAB / MathematicaSimulations and computationHypothesis generation + literature search. MATLAB does neitherMATLAB has decades of industrial-grade solver refinement; our 38 engine bridges span broader scientific domains at research-grade fidelity
aud_hero_sub: Who is c4reqber for? Honest assessment by research domain and TRL level.
aud_not_help_html:
Who It Does NOT Help (and Why)

WhoWhy it won't help
Experimenters who need dataThe system does not run experiments. It will say "you need to measure X" but won't measure X for you
Ultra-niche researchersIf your niche has <100 papers in 10 years, LLMs aren't trained on this data. Hypotheses will be generic or hallucinated
Those expecting guaranteed publishable resultsLLM generation is a creative trigger, not peer-reviewed science
Those who don't want to thinkThe system requires critical evaluation of output. Blind trust = noise
Practicing clinicians (treating patients)c4reqber is a research tool, not a diagnostic system. Do not use for diagnosis or treatment without peer review
aud_summary_html:
Summary

c4reqber is a research assistant at the level of "a very smart PhD student who read 200 papers over the weekend and proposed 5 hypotheses."

  • Does not replace: experiments, expertise, peer review, scientist intuition, therapeutic care
  • Accelerates: literature review, hypothesis formulation, structuring thinking, contradiction search, causal modeling, interdisciplinary transfer

If you expect c4reqber to "discover a new law of physics" — you will be disappointed.
If you expect c4reqber to "systematize your chaos of thoughts and point where to look next" — you will get exactly that.
aud_trl_html:
LevelMeaningCan c4reqber help?
TRL 1 — Basic principlesIdentify fundamental principlesYes. C4 navigation + 51 source literature search finds theory gaps
TRL 2 — Concept formulationFormulate a hypothesisYes. LLM generation with falsifiable predictions is a core feature
TRL 3 — Proof of conceptAnalytical or simulation proofPartially. 38 simulation engine bridges show direction, but these are toy models
TRL 4 — Lab validationLaboratory validationNo. The system has no hands, eyes, or reagents
TRL 5–9Pilot, field validation, commercializationNo. Out of scope

Conclusion: c4reqber operates at TRL 1–3. It helps move from "I have a problem" to "I have a structured hypothesis with mechanism, predictions, and literature list." Everything beyond that requires a human with a lab, data, or mathematical apparatus.

home_debate_analyst_desc: Breaks problem into entities, maps dependencies, ranks by centrality. SystemAnalyzer extracts the structure.
home_debate_critic_desc: Nature reviewer persona. Falsification engine. Platt's Strong Inference. Finds the holes before publication.
home_debate_desc: Analyst, Scientist, Critic, Synthesizer. Each with a distinct cognitive role.
home_debate_scientist_desc: Generates hypotheses via TRIZ, C4 navigation, literature gaps. Explores the unknown systematically.
home_debate_synth_desc: Resolves contradictions (CDI), builds consensus, writes dissertation. Consensus meter: 93.3% typical.
home_mcp_desc: JSON Schema compliant. stdio JSON-RPC. Any MCP host — Claude, Cursor, Cline, Continue.dev, and beyond.
home_paradigm_card1_desc: Detected that the hypothesis "sleep is active maintenance" has already been shifted by existing research. Consensus meter: 93.3%.
home_paradigm_card2_desc: Full article (4,985 chars). 10 sources. Bayesian AUC: 0.32. Uncertainty: 0.34. Passed ALL gates.
home_paradigm_card3_desc: Full dissertation (11,200 chars). 15 sources. Closed-form Φ approximation via C4 graph metrics. 10,000× speedup vs exact IIT 3.0. Pearson r = 0.94.
home_paradigm_desc: Real results. Real citations. Real verification.
home_social_desc: Dissertation → LaTeX + BibTeX → Auto-upload → ORCID → Social blast.
home_social_workflow: Workflow: Dissertation → LaTeX + BibTeX → Auto-upload → ORCID registration → Social blast
home_tui_cap_summary: ✓ 38 个仿真桥接 · 9 个验证器，覆盖 6 个领域
home_tui_desc: 38 sim engine bridges, 9 verifiers, capabilities overlay, command palette. The simulation/verification cockpit is in the terminal — not a fallback, the primary interface.
home_verify_desc: Your hypotheses don't just claim — they prove. Auto-selected by domain.

A coordinate system for general intelligence.
